body:
Mina, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from earlier this week — I've been thinking more about the [Threshold Ventures](people/mina-kapoor) pipeline and whether there's a natural co-investment angle worth exploring heading into the back half of the year. On our end, [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) is still actively deploying out of Fund III, and I'm told Marcus is still CEO over at the grid storage company we both looked at last quarter, so that door remains open if you want to revisit the term sheet conversation. I know you had reservations about the cap table structure, but I think there's room to negotiate given where the market has shifted. Let me know if you have bandwidth for a call next week — I'm fairly open Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon.

Amara
